panels.speaker: narrator
panels.hindi: Cutting din ke pehle grahak ka intezaar kar raha hai.
panels.english: Cutting is waiting for the day's first customer.
panels.pronunciation: CUT-ting din ke PEH-le GRAH-ak ka in-te-ZAAR kar ra-HA hai

panels.speaker: customer
panels.hindi: Do chai dena, bhaiya. Ek meri aur ek aapki.
panels.english: Two chais please. One for me and one for you.
panels.pronunciation: DO chai DE-na, BHAI-ya. EK ME-ri aur EK AAP-ki

panels.speaker: cutting
panels.hindi: Arrey wah! Mere liye bhi? Bahut shukriya, dost!
panels.english: Wow! For me too? Thanks a lot, friend!
panels.pronunciation: a-REY WAH! ME-re li-YE bhi? ba-HUT shuk-RI-ya, DOST

panels.speaker: cutting
panels.hindi: Main Cutting hoon. Half-chai bechta hoon, full-friendship deta hoon.
panels.english: I'm Cutting. I sell half-chai, I give full-friendship.
panels.pronunciation: MAIN CUT-ting hoon. HAALF-chai BECH-ta hoon, FULL-friend-ship DE-ta hoon
